title: Listening Summary
text:
Repetition KPI

Repetition KPI = Total Songs / Unique Songs — A value of 1 means every listen was a new track. Higher values mean more replaying of the same songs. Lower is more exploratory.


DailyWeeklyMonthly

title: Musical Discovery
text:
Discovery Rate Over Time

Discovery Rate = proportion of today’s songs that were first-ever listens. A rate of 0.5 means half of what you listened to today was new to you.

title: Musical Discovery
text:
Discovery Score

Discovery Score combines the track discovery rate (how much is new) and the inverse of repetition (how little you repeat) into a single 0–100 score. Higher = more exploratory listener.
Formula: (discovery_track_rate × 50) + (50 / repetition_kpi)

title: Artist Lifecycle
text:
Sticky Artists

Stickiness = fraction of days between first and last listen that you actually played this artist. A score of 1.0 would mean you listened every single day since discovery.

title: Artist Lifecycle
text:
Long-running Favorites

Artists with the longest active span (days between first and last listen).

title: Artist Lifecycle
text:
Comeback Artists

Artists who disappeared for 90+ days and then returned. More comebacks = a more cyclical listening pattern.

title: Artist Lifecycle
text:
Drifted Away

Artists you used to love but haven’t listened to in 180+ days — sorted by how much you played them historically.






Artists You've Drifted Away From
Not heard in 180+ days · Sorted by historical plays · Max 30 shown

title: Listening Summary
text:
Artist Diversity

Shannon Diversity measures how evenly your listening is spread across artists. Higher = more varied mix (no single artist dominates). Concentration Top-5 shows what fraction of plays comes from your top-5 artists — lower means a more diverse mix.


WeeklyMonthlyTop-5 Concentration

title: Spotify Listening Dashboard
text:
Dashboard Sections







 Summary


Overview of listening patterns — songs per day, weekly, and monthly trends with Repetition KPI and Diversity index.
Open Summary →









 Monthly


Month-over-month comparisons, yearly heatmap, seasonal patterns, and full monthly statistics table.
Open Monthly →









 Weekly Patterns


Day-of-week listening patterns, cumulative unique tracks per week, and historical distributions.
Open Weekly →








 Artists


Top artists this month and all time, artist trend over time, and diversity over time.
Open Artists →










 Discovery


New artists and tracks discovered over time, discovery rate, and your musical exploration score.
Open Discovery →









 Intraday


When you listen — hour-of-day heatmap, peak hours, and session length analysis.
Open Intraday →









 Lifecycle


Artist lifecycle: sticky favorites, long-running relationships, comebacks, and drifted-away artists.
Open Lifecycle →








Data updated daily · Last rendered on 2026-03-13
